Twin cylinder direct drive - no chains or cables
Three-stage arms for medium-duty work trucks
Arms retract for short wheelbase vehicles
Sealed steel ball bearing carriages - lifetime smooth performance, no greasing
No overhead cable covers - full height clearance
Full sets of truck adaptors included
